title: ちょいとドラマへの出演も目指し

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While taking a stroll along the riverside, I see
someone familiar.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I thought all the paths were closed off to me, but
because you extended a kind hand to me, I...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Fancy seeing you here!
CUUUT!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, no, Kita! You can't break character in the
middle of a scene like that! Let's take it once
more from the top!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Aw, man! Acting is a steep road to climb...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! You see, Kita has asked for my guidance
and has set off on the path to becoming a movie
star!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, don't get the wrong idea! This isn't for a
movie, and I'm just going to be an extra!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
One of the TV shows I like is recruiting extras at
the moment, so I thought I'd give it a shot and try
applying for a spot...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: However!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My sixth—no, my seventh sense is tingling. It's saying that your talents far exceed that of an extra!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With your innate star qualities and my guidance,
I'm positive you could become a real prima
donna!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What?! But I'm fine being an extra! Plus, I can
only participate in one day of filming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ignoring T.M. Opera O's booming laughter, I must
say, I'm surprised that Kitasan Black is interested
in acting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dad has been in the entertainment industry
for a long time and is quite talented. If Kitasan
Black asked, I'm sure he'd be happy to help her.
choice_data_list: Why didn't you ask your dad for advice?
Why didn't you ask your dad for advice?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It's because I want to surprise him.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm not the only one who likes this show.
My whole family loves it as well. Whenever I'm
back home, we all watch it together.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure we'll all sit on the sofa and watch it
together the next time I'm home too. Then, out of
nowhere, my face will show up on the TV...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And I bet Dad will be over the moon.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I see. Much like Christine, you strive to please
your father through your own power, even if it
means settling for a minor supporting role.
choice_data_list: That's Kitasan, all right! Kind and determined.

Then, using the skills she's acquired, she'll
become a movie star...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh... Very well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, I shall play not the phantom, but a
jack-of-all-trades, capable of solving all
problems.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will shutter that light of hers, fit for a main role,
so she may glimmer for an instance as a side
character... What a difficult task this will be.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yay, thanks! I'm looking forward to learning more
about acting from you, Opera—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But first, you must run toward the sunset! Let the
emotions inside your heart ignite and burst forth!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The advice T.M. Opera O offers is quite unique
and... difficult to understand, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Determinatiooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's personality is innately sincere, so
she's able to absorb all of T.M. Opera O's advice
to great effect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, Kitasan Black happily tells me
how she watched the show she appeared in as an
extra, alongside her dad.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wait, wait! I'm only applying for a role as
an extra!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know your potential! You possess the talent of
someone who will one day become a leader in the
world of theater! One worthy to act alongside me
in my own performances!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, then! I must impart upon you the necessary
skills to accomplish that! Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What is going on?! Hang on a minute, you two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, thanks to all of T.M. Opera O's diligent
mentoring in the art of acting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kitasan Black almost gets chosen to star in a certain TV show... but that's a story for another time.
